vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc
vocab.example: I often stop to marvel at the intricate gothic stonework of old cathedrals before taking a shot.

vocab.meaning: hòa hợp, tiệp màu với xung quanh
vocab.example: I love how some modern eco-friendly buildings manage to blend in with the natural landscape.

vocab.meaning: phóng to vào một chi tiết cụ thể
vocab.example: I prefer to zoom in on the weathered textures of ancient doors rather than taking a wide shot of the whole street.
The colonial-era villas really stand out against the backdrop of glass and steel skyscrapers.
Sometimes I stumble across hidden architectural gems while wandering through the older quarters of the city.

vocab.meaning: phản chiếu lên bề mặt nào đó
vocab.example: I enjoy capturing the way the sunset reflects on the glass facades of the financial district.

vocab.meaning: trải dài, mở rộng ra (thường nói về đô thị)
vocab.example: From the rooftop, you can see how the residential complexes sprawl out towards the horizon.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với phong cách chung
vocab.example: I like photographing how new renovations are designed to fit in with the historical aesthetic of the neighborhood.
When the architecture is too overwhelming, I scale back my composition to focus on a single window or arch.

vocab.meaning: làm rạng rỡ, làm sáng sủa hơn
vocab.example: The colorful street art on the side of that derelict warehouse really brightens up the whole photo.
